title: lindsaea botrychioides
intro: Lindsaea botrychioides, also known as the Wine Cup Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea botrychioides include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its purported ability to lower blood pressure and improve immune function.
